laws.title: Connecticut Minimum Wage —$16.94/hr (Effective January 1, 2026)
laws.summary: Connecticut's minimum wage increased to $16.94/hr on January 1, 2026, the highest in its history and second-highest among states (behind Washington at $17.13).
compliance_actions: Post updated Connecticut minimum wage notice
Review any employment agreements or offer letters
Review any employment agreements or offer letters referencing prior rates

laws.title: Warehouse Quota Notice Laws: Connecticut Joins the Club
laws.summary:
Warehouse Quota Notice Laws: Connecticut Joins the Club 
 As we reported back in 2021, California passed a first-in-the-nation law requiring certain employers operating warehouses and distribution centers to provide notice to employees of any productivity quotas, along with an identification of the adverse employment actions which could be imposed for failure to meet a quota.
